product_overview: ArgueTV is an AI-powered live debate platform that generates short multi-round debates on user-selected or trending topics, with synchronized audio, live captions, fact-checking overlays, and a post-debate verdict summary.
core_goals: Create a three-round AI debate on any user-provided or suggested topic
Discover and start debates from trending topics and live news articles
Listen to debates with synchronized TTS audio and live word-by-word captions
See automated mid-debate fact-checks and a final verdict summary of claims
Download the complete debate audio and switch debate language

features.name: Start AI Debate
features.description: Generate a three-round AI debate by entering a custom topic or using a suggested topic; watch the debate play out between two AI anchors.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Enter a custom debate topic -> Start debate generation -> See loading state with research ticker -> See two agent cards populated with debate text -> Watch the debate progress through three rounds -> See final verdict panel
Navigate to / -> Choose a trending or news topic to auto-fill -> Start debate generation -> See two agent cards populated and debate begin
Navigate to / -> Attempt to start debate with empty topic -> See validation message preventing generation

features.name: Trending Topics
features.description: Browse AI-generated trending debate topics and start a debate from any suggested topic in one action.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View trending topic chips -> Select a trending topic to auto-fill the debate topic -> Start debate generation -> See debate begin

features.name: Live News Feed
features.description: Browse paginated news cards pulled from RSS with a country filter and start debates from individual articles.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Browse news cards in the feed grid -> Select a country from the filter dropdown -> See news cards filtered to the chosen country -> Choose a news card to initiate a debate on that article -> See debate generation begin
Navigate to / -> Browse news cards -> Click Load More to reveal additional news cards -> Choose an article to start a debate

features.name: Audio Playback with Sync Captions
features.description: Hear sequential TTS playback for each debater with animated waveform and word-by-word live captions in sync with the audio.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Start a debate -> Watch agent1 speak with animated waveform and word-by-word caption reveal -> Observe automatic transition to agent2 after agent1 finishes -> See round progress indicator advance through rounds
Navigate to / -> Start a debate -> Pause playback -> Resume playback -> See captions resume in sync with audio

features.name: Live Fact Check
features.description: Receive an inline fact-check overlay after each round showing a verdict badge and short explanation, with audio announcement and manual dismissal option.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Start a debate -> After a round completes, see fact-check overlay appear with verdict badge and explanation -> Hear fact-check audio announcement -> Wait for overlay to auto-dismiss or click the backdrop to dismiss manually -> Debate resumes

features.name: Final Verdict Panel
features.description: After the debate, review a post-debate panel that lists claim cards with fact-check verdicts, an AI summary, and a speaker tally scorecard.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Start and watch a full debate -> At debate end, view final verdict panel with six claim cards showing TRUE/MISLEADING/FALSE badges -> Read the AI verdict summary -> See the tally scorecard per speaker

features.name: Live News Ticker
features.description: See a continuously scrolling bottom ticker with live headlines from RSS; hover to pause and open full articles in a new tab.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See scrolling headlines in the bottom ticker -> Hover over the ticker to pause scrolling -> Open a headline in a new tab to read the article

features.name: Download Debate Audio
features.description: After a debate completes, download a single combined MP3 containing the entire debate.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Start and complete a debate -> After debate completes, initiate audio download -> Receive combined MP3 file of the full debate

features.name: Language Selection
features.description: Choose the debate language so generated debate audio, captions, and text appear in the selected language.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Select a language from the dropdown -> Start debate generation -> See debate text and hear audio in the chosen language

routes.description: Main debate dashboard with topic input, trending topics, news cards, and debate arena

features.name: Start AI Debate
features.description: User enters a debate topic or selects from trending/news, generates a 3-round AI debate between two anchors
user_interactions: Type a custom debate topic in the input field
Click Start Debate button to generate
See loading state with research ticker
View two agent cards with debate text

features.name: Trending Topics
features.description: AI-generated trending debate topics displayed as clickable chips
user_interactions: Click a topic chip to auto-fill and start debate

features.name: Live News Feed
features.description: Paginated news cards from RSS feeds with country filter and one-click debate topics
user_interactions: Browse news cards in grid layout
Click Debate This button on a news card

features.name: Audio Playback with Sync Captions
features.description: Sequential TTS audio playback for each debater with word-by-word live captions
user_interactions: Watch agent1 speak with animated waveform
See word-by-word caption reveal in sync with audio

features.name: Live Fact Check
features.description: Mid-debate fact-checking overlay with verdict and audio announcement
user_interactions: See fact-check overlay appear after each round

features.name: Final Verdict Panel
features.description: Post-debate analysis showing 6 claim cards with fact-check verdicts and AI summary
user_interactions: View 6 claim cards (3 per speaker) with TRUE/MISLEADING/FALSE badges

features.name: Live News Ticker
features.description: Scrolling bottom news ticker with live RSS headlines
user_interactions: See scrolling headlines at bottom of page
Click headline to open article in new tab

features.name: Download Debate Audio
features.description: Download combined MP3 of the entire debate after completion
user_interactions: Click download button after debate completes

features.name: Language Selection
features.description: Select debate language for multilingual AI debates

known_limitations.issue: In-memory cache resets on serverless cold start (Vercel)
known_limitations.impact: Ticker and news caches lost between function invocations in production

known_limitations.issue: No database - all state is in-memory or client-side
Caption speed slightly faster than audio speech rate
known_limitations.impact: Captions may finish before audio ends by ~10%
